note: PRE-SPLIT nominal price. Modern feeds split-adjust the whole history, so the contemporaneous nominal close is recovered as Yahoo raw_close x cumulative split factor (10:1 on 2024-06-07, AFTER as_of -> factor 10). Independent corroboration that does NOT come from the price feed: FY23 10-K share count (2.47B) x card market cap $938B = $379.76/sh, plus dated 2023-05-25 record-close news (S008/S009/S011/S012, ~$1T market value). This is the pattern every pre-split backtest case must follow.

live_fields.low_high_hug_reason: Record-close entry BY DESIGN: NVDA closed +24% at an all-time high on the AI Data Center guide; the case deliberately tests entering at the post-print spike. -3.8% off the 52wk high is expected and intentional, not a low/high-grab error.

sources.note: raw close 37.98 x 10 (10:1 split 2024-06-07, after as_of)

sources.url: FY23 10-K (S004) 2.47B pre-split shares x card mcap $938B
CNBC S008 / CNBC S009 / CNN S011 / WaPo S012, dated 2023-05-25
sources.note: record close; market value approaching ~$1T corroborates the level

live_fields.value: As of 2023-05-25: US Oct-2022 rules restrict top-end (A100/H100) to China; NVDA ships China-compliant A800/H800. The EXPANDED Oct-2023 controls (which banned A800/H800) are AFTER as_of and must NOT be used.

sources.note: risk factor: US export controls on advanced GPUs to China
China demand served within the compliant lineup

live_fields.value: Q2 FY24 revenue $11.0B +/-2% (the forced market update vs ~$7.2B consensus)
